# langchain-unison

> Python package that gives LangChain applications persistent memory backed by
> the Unison brain — a personal knowledge graph that stores and recalls context
> across every session, tool, and agent.

**Agents: start with [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** — it covers install, auth, the
three classes, and the recall-before / persist-after pattern in one page.

## Docs
- [README.md](README.md): overview, quickstart, usage snippets, env vars, releasing
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an AI agent installs, authenticates, and uses this package; contributing guide
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup, conventions, PR checklist
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting and credential handling

## Usage
Install:
```bash
pip install langchain-unison
```
Set your Unison API key:
```bash
export UNISON_TOKEN="usk_live_..."
```
Use in a LangChain chain:
```python
from langchain_unison import UnisonMemory, UnisonChatMessageHistory, UnisonRetriever
```

## Examples
```python
# Recall context before reasoning
memory = UnisonMemory()
inputs = {"input": "What pricing model did we decide on?"}
inputs.update(memory.load_memory_variables(inputs))
# ... run chain ...
memory.save_context(inputs, outputs)

# Session-scoped message history
history = UnisonChatMessageHistory(session_id="my-session-001")

# Semantic search retriever
retriever = UnisonRetriever(k=6)
docs = retriever.invoke("enterprise tier decision")
```
